changes.old: Contact field supervisor Dana Price for emergencies; if no answer try main dispatch; if still no answer take message and promise 2-hour callback for weather emergencies
changes.new: Contact field supervisor Dana Price for emergencies; if no answer try main dispatch; if still no answer take message and promise 4-hour callback for weather emergencies

changes.old: promise callback within 2 hours for weather emergencies
changes.new: promise callback within 4 hours for weather emergencies

old: active water infiltration into a structure
new: active water infiltration into a structure
